label: Nullglow Sleep Cell
description: Nullglow Sleep Cell is a narrow bedroom cut deep into the shielded hab mass of Nullglow Servitorium, its black vitrified stone and slagcrete surfaces set to resist ash abrasion and structural vibration. A riveted bunk-frame and underbunk stowage are fixed directly to the wall, with a fold-down shelf serving as a writing and kit-maintenance surface. Slit-lamps sit behind shuttered baffles that keep illumination low and non-reflective under auroral backwash, while a gasketed vent-grille meters air through overplated filters. The doorframe and ceiling seams carry impact strips and bolted braces, reflecting the Bastion’s permanent condition of tremor and interference from nearby beacon pylons.
